introduction: Qutbul Madar jinhain Hazrat Syed Badiuddin Zinda Shah Madar (RA) ke naam se bhi jana jata hai, Sufi riwayat ki aik bohat muqaddas aur azeem shakhsiyat hain. Aap asal mein Syria se thay aur aap ki paidaish 856 AD mein shehar Halab (jo ab Aleppo ke naam se jana jata hai) mein hui. Baad mein aap ne Hindustan ki taraf hijrat ki jahan aap ne Madariyya Sufi silsila qaim kiya. Qutbul Madar ki official website par aap ki zindagi, taleemat aur aap ke qaim karda Sufi silsila ke hawale se mukammal maloomat mojood hai.
key-features: Website par mojood chand aham khusosiyat

sections.title: Urs-e-Sarkaar Syed Badiuddin Zinda Shah Madar
sections.description: Website par Hazrat Syed Badiuddin Zinda Shah Madar ke Urs (wisaal ki barsi) ki maloomat di gayi hai jo har saal 13, 14 aur 15 February ko manaya jata hai.

sections.title: Dargah Hazrat Syed Badiuddin Zinda Shah Madar
sections.description: Website par Hazrat Syed Badiuddin Zinda Shah Madar ki Dargah Shareef se mutalliq tafseeli maloomat faraham ki gayi hai.

sections.title: Jamia Arbiya Madarul Uloom Madinatul Auliya
sections.description: Yeh aik taleemi idara hai jahan zarooratmand talaba ko taleem di jati hai. Website ke zariye logon ko in talaba ki madad ke liye donation dene ki targheeb di jati hai.

sections.title: Mazar Shareef Chadar Poshi
sections.description: Website par Dargah mein hone wali mahana Chadar Poshi aur Phool Poshi ki rasoomat ke bare mein maloomat di gayi hai.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.description: Website par un afraad ke liye rabta maloomat mojood hai jo in rasoomat mein shirkat karna chahte hain ya taleemi idare ki madad karna chahte hain.

sections.title: Useful Books
sections.description: Website par English, Urdu, Hindi aur Farsi zabanon mein mufeed kutub mojood hain.

articles.title: UNESCO ne Chamba ko Heritage City qarar diya
articles.description: Syrian Sufi buzurg Syed Badiuddin Ahmad Zinda Shah Madar ne Chamba ki roohani aur saqafati taraqqi mein bunyadi kirdar ada kiya. Aap ki paidaish 9th century mein Halab, Syria mein hui. Aap Hasani aur Hussaini Syed thay aur paidaish se hi ghair mamooli roohani sifaat ke haamil thay. Bayazeed Bustami jaisay azeem Sufi buzurgon se roohani taleem hasil karne ke baad aap ko Hindustan mein Sufism phailane ka hukum mila. 859 AD mein aap Hindustan tashreef laye aur Gujarat, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Bengal, Kashmir aur Nepal tak safar kiya. Chamba mein aap ki karamaat ke sabab ilaqa qudrati aafaat aur buri quwaton se mehfooz raha. Aap ki barkat se Raja Sahil Verman ne Chamba ko darul hukoomat banaya. Madari Sufi riwayat ne Chamba ki saqafat par gehra asar chhoda. Aaj bhi Chamba mein Shah Madar ka Chilla aik aham roohani aur tareekhi markaz hai.

articles.title: Makanpur mein purani Khanqahi riwayat ka dilkash manzar
articles.description: Makanpur Shareef, jahan 818 Hijri mein Zinda Shah Madar ne qiyam farmaya, aaj bhi Madari Sufi riwayat ka zinda markaz hai. Sadiyon se yeh Khanqah Sajjadagi ki asal riwayat ko barqarar rakhe hue hai, khas tor par Urs ke mauqe par jo Jamadil Awwal mein hota hai. 16 aur 17 Jamadil Awwal ko aik munfarid riwayat ada ki jati hai jismein virasati Sajjada Nashin Takht-e-Sajjadagi par juloos farmate hain aur Qur’an Majeed ko aik kashti mein rakh kar pesh kiya jata hai. Yeh amal Rasool Allah ﷺ ki us taleem ki nishani hai jismein Ahl-e-Bait ko Hazrat Nuh (AS) ki kashti se tashbeeh di gayi hai. Tamam mushkilat ke bawajood Madari Sajjada Nashinon ki virasati silsila aaj bhi barqarar hai.

articles.title: Syed Badiuddin Ahmad Zinda Shah Madar ka mukhtasar ta’aruf
articles.description: Syed Badiuddin Ahmad Zinda Shah Madar jinhain Qutbul Madar aur Madar-e-Aalam bhi kaha jata hai, 1 Shawwal 242 Hijri (856 AD) ko Halab, Syria mein paida hue. Aap Nabi Kareem ﷺ ki nasal se Hasani aur Hussaini Syed thay. Bachpan se hi karamaat zahir hone lagi thin aur 14 saal ki umar mein zahiri aur batini uloom mein kamal hasil kar liya. Aap ko Sultan-ul-Arifeen Bayazeed Bustami se khilafat hasil hui aur baad mein Rasool Allah ﷺ aur Moula Ali se barah-e-raast roohani rehnumai mili. Allah ke hukum se aap Hindustan tashreef laye aur paanch sadiyon tak Islam ki tabligh, roohani markazon ka qiyam aur lakhon logon ki rehnumai farmate rahe. 1417 AD mein aap ka wisal Makanpur mein hua jahan aaj bhi aap ki Dargah roohani faiz ka markaz hai.

introduction.p1: Qutbul Madar wilayat ke maydan mein aisa roshan sooraj hain ke unki roshni ne musalmanon ke dilon, dimagh aur roohon ko Asia aur Europe mein manwar kar diya. Is ki roshni ne sirf Bar-e-Sagheer hi nahi balki Europe aur Africa ke Khanqahon aur Madaris ko bhi roshan kiya.
introduction.p2: Paanch sau chhiyanwe saal ki paakiza zindagi ke tamam pehluon ko bayan karna bohot mushkil hai. Ye mukhtasir bayan aik aajizana koshish hai taake unki mubarak sawanah ko tareekh mein darj kiya ja sake.

identity.title: Naam aur Alqabat
identity.titles: Shah Madar, Zinda Shah Madar, Shaikh Madar, Qutbul Madar, Madarul Alameen, Zinda Pir, Zinda Wali, Madar-e-Azam, Sar Giroh-e-Ahle Tabaqat, Pir Zinda Madar
identity.amongSufis: Sufiyon mein unhein Zindan-e-Suf aur Abdullah ke naam se yaad kiya jata hai.

birth.title: Paidaish
birth.content: Woh 1st Shawwal 242 Hijri ko Halab (Syria) mein Monday, Eid ke din paida hue. Unki mubarak paidaish ne unke walid Sayyed Ali Halabi ke ghar ko roshan kiya.

dreamsBeforeBirth.title: Paidaish se pehle khushkhabri
dreamsBeforeBirth.content: Unki walida Bibi Fatima Sania ne apne saahn mein ek roshan sooraj ko ubhrte dekha jo door door tak phail gaya. Unke walid ne khwab mein Prophet Muhammad ﷺ ko dekha jo unhein Badiuddin naam ke nek betay ki khushkhabri de rahe thay.

miraclesAtBirth.title: Paidaish ke waqt karamat
miraclesAtBirth.content: Paidaish ke lamhe mein charon taraf 'Allah' ki awaazain suni gayi. Nozaiyada foran sajda mein gaya aur Kalima parha.

genealogy.title: Muqaddas Nasab
genealogy.fatherSide: Walid ki taraf se unka nasab Imam Husain (RA) tak jata hai.
genealogy.motherSide: Walida ki taraf se unka nasab Imam Hasan (RA) tak jata hai.

education.title: Ibtidai Taleem
education.content: Char saal, char mahine aur char din ki umar mein unhon ne taleem shuru ki. Choudah saal ki umar tak unhon ne Quran, Hadith, Fiqh aur Islami Uloom mein mahart hasil kar li thi.

spiritualTraining.title: Rohani Tarbiyat aur Khilafat
spiritualTraining.content: Unhon ne Jafaria Husainia silsila mein khilafat hasil ki aur Sultanul Arifin Bayazidi Bustami ke zair-e-tarbiyat aala darja ke tasawwuf ke marahil mukammal kiye.

meetingProphet.title: Madina mein Hazoor ki Mojoodgi
meetingProphet.content: Hajj ke baad unhein Prophet Muhammad ﷺ ki mojoodgi mein rohani izzat mili aur unhein Hindustan mein Islam phailane aur dilon ko Tawheed ki roshni se manwar karne ka hukm diya gaya.

missionToIndia.title: Hindustan ka mission
missionToIndia.content: Iman ke sath unhon ne Bharat ki taraf safar shuru ki. Woh din bhar roza rakhte aur mukammal tor par Allah par bharosa karte thay.

journeyToIndia.title: Samundari Safar
journeyToIndia.content: Jahaz mein safar ke doran toofan se jahaz tabah ho gaya. Allah ke fazl se woh aik takht par mehfooz pohanche aur Gujarat pohanche.

arrivalKhambat.title: Khambat mein aagman (282 Hijri)
arrivalKhambat.content: Woh Gujarat ke Khambat pohanche aur wahan Islam phailane ka kaam shuru kiya. Hazrat Khizr ne unhein is muqaddas maqam par rohani rehnumai di.

maqam.title: Maqam-e-Samadiyat
maqam.content: Unhon ne Maqam-e-Samadiyat hasil ki. Unka chehra ilahi noor se roshan tha aur jo bhi unhein dekhta, Allah ko yaad karta aur sajda karta. Unhon ne apne chehra ko dhak kar rakha.

langar.title: Langar – Bhandara
langar.subtitle: Jism ki parwarish, rooh ki taskeen
langar.content:
"Langar – Bhandara" Makanpur mein Qutbul Madar Dargah par idare ki taraf se faraham ki jane wali ek hamdardana aur be-gharz khidmat hai. Isaar aur insaniyat ki khidmat ke jazbe par mabni, yeh iqdaam maeeshi haisiyat se qat-e-nazar zarooratmandon ki bhuuk mitane aur unhe ghizaiyat faraham karne ka maqsad rakhta hai.

Langar – Bhandara ka johar ijtimae dastarkhwan ki riwayat mein pinha hai, jahan zindagi ke har shobe se taluq rakhne wale afraad baraabari ki bunyaad par ek saath khana khane aate hain. Is khidmat ke markaz mein yeh yaqeen hai ke khana na sirf jism ko palta hai balke rooh ko bhi seraab karta hai aur tamam shareekeen mein ittihaad, hamdardi aur khairkhwahi ka jazba paida karta hai.

Har roz Dargah ke razaakar aur aqeedat mand mil kar muashre ke kam naseeb afraad ke liye sehat bakhsh khana tayyar karte aur paish karte hain. Khane mein aam taur par chawal, daal, sabziyan, roti aur kabhi kabhi meethe pakwan shamil hote hain, jo sab mohabbat aur aqeedat se tayyar kiye jate hain.

Langar – Bhandara ki khidmat zaat, aqeede ya mazhab se qat-e-nazar sab ke liye khuli hai aur Dargah ki taleemat ke mutabiq shumooliyat aur musawaat ki rooh ka mujassima hai. Chahe koi barkat ka mutalaashi zaaer ho, raste se guzarne wala musafir ho, ya mushkil mein ghira mahalli bashinda ho — sab ka khule dil se khairmaqdim kiya jaata hai.

Langar – Bhandara mein shirkat mahaz khana haasil karne tak mahdood nahin; yeh afraad ke liye doosron ki khidmat aur dene ki khushi ka tajruba karne ka moqa bhi hai. Razaakar is khidmat mein aham kirdar ada karte hain, is baat ko yaqeeni banane ke liye apna waqt aur mehnat waqf karte hain ke koi bhuuka na rahe.

Fauri ghizaai zaroorat ko poora karne ke ilaawa, Langar – Bhandara muashre mein umeed aur hamdardi ki roshni ka meenar hai. Yeh khuraak ki adam yaqeeni soorat-e-haal se dochar logon ko ek mehfooz panah gaah faraham karta hai, unhe rozana ki zindagi ki mushkilaat se rahat ka ek lamha deta hai.

Langar – Bhandara ka asar khane ki jagah ki hududd se kahin aage tak phaila hua hai, apni mehrabani aur sakhawat ke paigham se har us shakhs ki zindagi ko choota hai jo is se milta hai. Yeh muashre mein yakjehti aur ittihaad ka jazba farogh deta hai.

Call / WhatsApp: 00 – 91 – 9838360930
Nayab Sajjada Nasheen Wali Ahad Khanqahe Madariya Makanpur
Syed Zafar Mujeeb Madari

dargah-mannat.title: Dargah Mannat
dargah-mannat.subtitle: Apni duayen Khuda ke supurd karein
dargah-mannat.content:
"Dargah Mannat" Makanpur mein waqe Qutbul Madar Dargah par paish ki jane wali ek munfarid khidmat hai. Yeh muqaddas maqam un aqeedat mandon ke dilon mein khaas jagah rakhta hai jo apni duaon, khwahishaat aur aarzooun ki takmeel chahte hain. "Mannat" yani dua ka johar is khidmat ke markaz mein hai, jo zaroorat ke lamhaat mein aqeedat mandon ko umeed ki kiran faraham karta hai.

Dargah Mannat mein, log apni duaen aur khwahishaat us ilahi taqat ke supurd karte hain jo is muqaddas maqam mein maujood maani jati hai. Yeh amal aqeedat mand ki janib se apni dili khwahishaat ke izhaar se shuru hota hai — chahe woh sehat, khushhaali, kamyabi ya zindagi ke kisi bhi pehlu ke liye ilahi mudakhalat ki aarzoo ho. Yeh duaen intehai ikhlaas aur aqeedat ke saath, nasl dar nasl chali aa rahi rasoomaat aur taqaarib ke saath paish ki jati hain.

Dargah Mannat ki ek numayan khususiyat yeh hai ke aqeedat mandon ka yaqeen hai ke is muqaddas maqam par mangi gayi duaen qabool hone ka zyada imkaan hota hai. Yeh maana jata hai ke Dargah se munsalik awliya aur muqaddas hastiyaon ki ruhani tawanai aur barkaat in duaon ki taaseer ko barhati hain.

Mannat maangne ke amal mein na sirf dua ka fail shamil hai balke ilahi mashiyyat ke saamne gehra iman aur supurdagi bhi shamil hai. Aqeedat mand iman se bhare dilon ke saath aate hain aur Dargah ki taqat par bharosa karte hain.

Dargah Mannat ke zaaireen aksar door door se aate hain — zindagi ke mukhtalif pehluon ke liye sukoon, rahnumai aur duaon ki talaash mein. Chahe mushkilaat ka samna ho, nayi shuroaat ke liye dua maangni ho ya mili hui neamton par shukar guzari karni ho — aqeedat mand is muqaddas maqam par sukoon aur itminan paate hain.

Dargah Mannat ki fiza khushoo aur aqeedat se bharpoor hai — bhajnon ki sureeli aawazon aur oud-o-bukhoor ki khushbu ke darmiyaan aqeedat mand apni duaen paish karte hain. Yeh woh jagah hai jahan maadi aur ruhani duniya ki hududd dhundli ho jati hain.

Dargah Mannat ki ziyarat karne walon ke dilon mein dua ki taqat aur is muqaddas maqam mein samai ilahi rehmat par gehra yaqeen maujood hai. Yeh lataadad afraad ke paedaar iman ka saboot hai.

Call / WhatsApp: 00 – 91 – 9838360930
Nayab Sajjada Nasheen Wali Ahad Khanqahe Madariya Makanpur
Syed Zafar Mujeeb Madari

special-dua.title: Khasoosi Dua
special-dua.subtitle: Aapke pyaaron ke liye makhsoos duaen
special-dua.content:
"Khasoosi Dua" Makanpur mein Qutbul Madar Dargah par paish ki jane wali ek munfarid khidmat hai, jahan aqeedat mandon ko kisi khaas shakhs ya apne dil ke qareeb maqaasid ke liye makhsoos duaon ki darkhwast karne ka moqa milta hai. Dua ki yeh zaati naoiyyat us shakhs ki munfarid zarooriyaat, challenges ya aarzooun ko madde nazar rakh kar tayyar ki jati hai jis ke liye dua maangi ja rahi hai.

Khasoosi Dua ka johar markooz aur dili dua ki taqat mein pinha hai, jo un logon ki zindagion mein ilahi barkaat aur mudakhalat ko mutawajjah karne ki salahiyat rakhti hai jin ke liye dua ki ja rahi hai. Aqeedat mand apni niyyaton ke saath Dargah ka rukh karte hain — chahe yeh shifa, tahaffuz, rahnumai ya zindagi ke kisi doosre pehlu ke liye ilahi madad ki darkhwast ho.

Khasoosi Dua ki darkhwast ke amal mein aam taur par Dargah ke mutawallion ya ruhani rahnumaon ko apni makhsoos niyyat ya zaroorat se aagah karna shamil hai, jo phir mutaalliqah fard ya afraad ki janib se makhsoos duaon ki adaayegi ki zimmedari lete hain.

Khasoosi Dua ke dauran paish ki jane wali duaen apni gehri ikhlaas, iman aur aqeedat ke liye jaani jati hain. Dargah ke mutawalli aur ruhani rahnuma muqaddas rasoomaat, muqaddas mutoon ki tilawat aur dili munaajaat ke zariye ilahi rehmat aur barkaat ki iltija karte hain.

Khasoosi Dua ko munfarid banati hai duaon ki zaati naoiyyat — jo un afraad ke makhsoos halaat aur challenges ko mukhaatib karti hai jin ke liye dua maangi ja rahi hai. Chahe kisi azeez ki sehat-o-khushhaali ho, koshishon mein kamyabi ho, tanazaaat ka hal ho ya koi doosri aham zaroorat — aqeedat mandon ko yeh jaan kar sukoon milta hai ke unki fikrein imandari aur mohabbat se Allah ke huzoor paish ki ja rahi hain.

Khasoosi Dua mein shirkat dua maangne wale aur dua karne wale dono ke liye ek gehre maani khyez aur ruhani taur par bharpoor tajruba hai. Yeh momineen mein baradari, hamdardi aur yakjehti ka ehsaas paida karta hai.

Call / WhatsApp: 00 – 91 – 9838360930
Nayab Sajjada Nasheen Wali Ahad Khanqahe Madariya Makanpur
Syed Zafar Mujeeb Madari

full-ghilaf.title: Pura Ghilaaf
full-ghilaf.subtitle: Buzurg ki Mazar ke liye ek Muqaddas Astar
full-ghilaf.content:
"Pura Ghilaaf" Makanpur mein Qutbul Madar Dargah par manai jane wali ek muqaddas riwayat hai, jis mein aqeedat mand buzurg ki mazar ke mukammal kapde ke astar — yani ghilaaf — ko naye se badalne ka tazeemi amal anjam dete hain. Yeh rasmi amal momineen ke liye gehra mana rakhta hai aur tajdeed, tazeeem aur buzurg-o-Khuda ke saath gehre ruhani taluq ka mazhar hai.

Pure ghilaaf ki riwayat sadion purani rasoomaat aur rawaajon mein juri hui hai, jo un aqeedat mandon ki nasl dar nasl chali aa rahi hai jo buzurg ko intehai qadr ki nigaah se dekhte hain. Is purwaqaar taqreeb ke tehat aqeedat mand buzurg ke saath apni aqeedat aur shukriaguzari ke izhaar ke taur par taza ghilaaf charhane ki niyyat se Dargah par jama hote hain.

Pure ghilaaf ka amal aam taur par buzurg ki mazar se maujuda kapde ke astar ko intehai ehtiyaat aur tazeeem ke saath hatane se shuru hota hai. Waqt ki guzran se purana aur boseedah ho jane wala ghilaaf adab se utar kar ek taraf rakh diya jata hai aur naye ghilaaf ke liye jagah banai jati hai.

Naya ghilaaf, jo aksar qeemti kapron, karhaayi aur muqaddas naqoosh se muzayyan hota hai, buzurg ki mazar par ehtiyaat se charhaya jata hai. Mazar ko taza kapde se dhakne ka yeh amal aqeedat mand ki us khwaahish ka mazhar hai ke woh buzurg ki muqaddas aaramgaah ki tazeeem aur hifazat kare.

Pure ghilaaf ki taqreeb ke saath saath duaen, bhajan aur muqaddas mutoon ki tilawat ki jati hai, jis se Dargah mein tazeeem aur aqeedat ki fiza qaim hoti hai. Aqeedat mand iman aur tazeeem se bhare dilon ke saath is taqreeb mein shirkat karte hain.

Pura ghilaaf charhane ka amal mahaz rasmi nahin hai; yeh ek gehra ruhani tajruba hai jo ilahi ke saath judaao aur irtibaat ka ehsaas paida karta hai. Yeh aajizi aur aqeedat ka ek izhaar hai jo buzurg ke buland martabe ko tasleem karta hai.

Pure ghilaaf mein shirkat aqeedat mandon ke liye ek intehai maani khyez aur ruhani taur par bharpoor tajruba hai, kyunke yeh unhe buzurg ke saath apni mohabbat, tazeeem aur aqeedat ko thos aur gehre andaaz mein zahir karne ka moqa deta hai.

Call / WhatsApp: 00 – 91 – 9838360930
Nayab Sajjada Nasheen Wali Ahad Khanqahe Madariya Makanpur
Syed Zafar Mujeeb Madari

big-deg.title: Big Deg Taqseem
big-deg.subtitle: Qutbul Madar Dargah, Makanpur mein zarooratmandon ki khidmat
big-deg.intro: Big Deg Taqseem Makanpur mein waqe Qutbul Madar Dargah mein pesh ki jaane wali ek nek khidmat hai, jis mein bade bade khana pakane ke bartan — jinhen 'deg' kaha jata hai — ka istemal karke badi tadad mein zarooratmand logon ke liye khana taiyar kiya jata hai. Kuch degon mein ek baar mein 100 se zyada afraad ka khana pakaya ja sakta hai.
big-deg.ingredients_body: Yeh amal aala mayaar ke ajza — anaaj, sabziyaan, masaale aur protein — ke ehtiyaat se intikhab se shuru hota hai, taake har khana ghizaiyat bakhsh aur sehatmand ho.
big-deg.cooking_body: Razakaar aur aqeedatmand mil kar khana pakane, hilane aur masala daalne mein lag jaate hain. Badi degein khuli aag par ublti hain aur taza pake khane ki mehak har taraf phail jaati hai. Menu mein chawal, daal, sabziyaan, gosht aur roti shamil hoti hai.
big-deg.distribution_body: Khana taiyar hone ke baad use ehtiyaat se taqseem kiya jata hai aur ghareeb o zarooratmand afraad mein mohabbat, izzat aur hamdardi ke saath pesh kiya jata hai.
big-deg.impact_body: Big Deg Taqseem mahaz khane se barh kar hai. Bahut se wasool kunindagan ke liye yeh khana izzat, tawajju aur apnaiyat ki alamat hai — ek yaad dehani ke woh apni biradari mein dekhe aur ahmiyat diye jaate hain.
big-deg.volunteer_body: Big Deg Taqseem mein hissa lena ek intehai sukoon bakhsh tajurba hai, jo razakaaron ko dargah ke muqaddas buzurg ki talimaat ke mutabiq be-gharazi aur insaniyat ki khidmat ke usoolon ko apnane ka mauqa deta hai.

live-ziyarat.title: Live Ziyarat aur Dua
live-ziyarat.subtitle: Duniya ke kisi bhi kone se Dargah se judein
live-ziyarat.intro: Live Ziyarat aur Dua Makanpur mein waqe Qutbul Madar Dargah ki ek jadeed khidmat hai, jo duniya bhar ke aqeedatmandon ko phone ya internet ke zariye ziyarat aur dua mein haqeeqi waqt mein shirkat ka mauka faraham karti hai.
live-ziyarat.belief_body: Is khidmat ki bunyaad is yaqeen par hai ke jismani fasla Ilahi huzoor aur barkat hasil karne mein rukawat nahin banna chahiye. Technology ke zariye aqeedatmand dargah ki rasoomat mein aise shareek ho sakte hain jaise woh khud wahan maujood hon.
live-ziyarat.process_body: Door daraz ke ijlas ke liye ek makhsoos waqt muqarrar kiya jata hai, jis mein dargah ke ek roohani peshwa door daraz shurka ki taraf se ziyarat aur dua karate hain — muqaddas aayaat padhte, duaen mangte aur buzurg ki barakaat talab karte hain.
live-ziyarat.preparation_body: Shurka ko tashweeq di jaati hai ke woh roohani aur zehni taur par taiyar hon, tawajju bhatakane wali cheezon ko door rakhen aur apne dil ko Ilahi huzoor par markooz karen.
live-ziyarat.purpose_heading: Talab Karen, Shifa Paen, Shukar Ada Karen
live-ziyarat.purpose_body: Chahey koi mushkil ho, shifa ki talash ho ya shukarguazari ka izhaar karna ho — shurka ko yeh jan kar sukoon milta hai ke unki duaen suni ja rahi hain aur unki niyyat dargah ke roohani peshwaon ke zariye buland ki ja rahi hai.
live-ziyarat.impact_body: Live Ziyarat aur Dua mein shirkat ek gehra aur tabdeeli laane wala tajurba hai — un lazawal talimaat aur barakaat ki yaad dehani jo buzurg ne apne muqaddas mazar par panah aur rahnumai mangne walon ko ata farmai hain.
live-ziyarat.volunteer_body: Qutbul Madar Dargah, Makanpur ke roohani peshwaon ke saath apna Live Ziyarat aur Dua session book karne ke liye rabta karen. Nayab Sajjada Nashin aur Khadim Madariya Makanpur, Syed Zafar Majeed Madari se call ya WhatsApp karen.

madarShareefChadarPoshi:
“Madar e Shareef – Chadar Poshi” Makanpur mein waqia Qutbul Madar Dargah par ada ki jane wali ek muqaddas riwayat hai jahan aqeedat mand buzurg ke mazar par ek chadar pesh karte hain. Yeh amal aqeedat, shukarguzari aur buzurg se roohani ta’alluq ki alamat hai.

Chadar Poshi ki riwayat auliya aur muqaddas hastiyon ki tazeem se juri hui hai. Jab log mazar par hazir hote hain to woh khubsurat kadhai wali chadar saath late hain.

Mazar par chadar charhana apni umeedein aur khwahishen buzurg ke qadam mein rakh dene ki nishani hai. Mana jata hai ke chadar roohani barkat hasil karti hai.

Yeh sirf ek rasam nahi balki gehri imani aur roohani ibadat hai.

Call / WhatsApp: 00 – 91 – 9838360930
Nayab Sajjada Nasheen wali Ahad Khanqahe Madariya Makanpur
Syed Zafar Mujeeb Madari
